Package io.github.bbobbogi.stream4j.chzzk.chat

Class ChatMessage

java.lang.Object
io.github.bbobbogi.stream4j.chzzk.chat.ChatMessage
Direct Known Subclasses:
DonationMessage, SubscriptionMessage
public class ChatMessage extends Object
Class representing a chat message.
Since:
1.0.0
